chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4067 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection No.18 2. For order on CMA No.17071/2021 3. For order on CMA No.17072/2021 4. For hearing of main case 14.1.2026 None present for the petitioner --------------------- This is an old petition of 2021, which is over four years ago. It was last fixed on 26.1.2022, when none was in attendance on behalf of the petitioner and still there is no progress in the matter. In view of the above, it appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition and this Court is left with no option, but to dismiss this lis. The petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed / pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
